problem.title: CT-ICP regularizer N_corr cap sweep on KITTI Odometry 02 (full)
problem.question: Which cap value (10/30/60/120/300) keeps the long-trajectory stability of full N_corr while reclaiming some of the flat-regularizer RPE win?

variants.label: ms_chol + regularizer_n_cap=10 (near-flat)
variants.intent: Predicted to diverge on long traj; baseline check vs flat-regularizer ATE +337%.

variants.label: ms_chol + regularizer_n_cap=30 (KITTI 07 RPE best)
variants.intent: RPE-best on KITTI 07 (-37%). Test long-traj stability.

variants.label: ms_chol + regularizer_n_cap=60 (KITTI 07 balance)
variants.intent: Best ATE/RPE balance on KITTI 07. Most promising cross-seq candidate.

variants.label: ms_chol + regularizer_n_cap=120
variants.intent: Mid reduction; KITTI 07 ATE +117% (already poor) but check long-traj.
